arts.ttl: Rafael Leão: Barcelona’s Prime Target and Milan’s Champions League Hero
arts.sum: Rafael Leão has once again proven his worth on the grand stage of the Champions League, scoring for the third consecutive match and securing a crucial victory for AC Milan against Girona. This win propelled the Rossoneri to sixth place in the standings, further cementing Leão's reputation as a player who thrives in high-stakes European nights.
